scenes.narration: Daniel was different from everyone around him. He prayed to God three times every day — no matter what.
scenes.image_prompt: Daniel kneeling peacefully in prayer by a window with soft golden light streaming in, a beautiful city visible outside, bright colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Some men were jealous of Daniel. They convinced the king to make a new law — no praying to anyone but the king.
scenes.image_prompt: Sneaky men whispering to a king on his throne, sly expressions, king holding a royal scroll, bright colorful bible storybook illustration with dramatic mood

scenes.narration: Daniel heard about the new law. And he kept right on praying.
scenes.image_prompt: Daniel kneeling in prayer with a calm smile, windows open, bright golden light, knowing and peaceful expression, colorful children's bible illustration

scenes.narration: They caught him. And the punishment was the lion's den — a deep pit filled with hungry lions.
scenes.image_prompt: Daniel being led by guards to a dark stone pit, peering over the edge at roaring lions below, dramatic colorful bible storybook art, Daniel looking calm and unafraid

scenes.narration: The king was heartbroken. He didn't want to do it. But the law was the law. Daniel was lowered in.
scenes.image_prompt: A sad king watching as Daniel is lowered into the dark pit, tears on the king's face, guards looking solemn, colorful dramatic bible illustration

scenes.narration: That night the king couldn't sleep. He paced all night long, worrying about Daniel.
scenes.image_prompt: King pacing back and forth in his royal chamber at nighttime, looking worried and unable to sleep, moonlight through the window, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: At sunrise, the king ran to the den and called out — Daniel! Did your God save you?
scenes.image_prompt: King running toward the lion's den at sunrise, golden morning light, soldiers watching, hopeful and anxious expression, bright colorful bible illustration

scenes.narration: And Daniel called back — Yes! God sent His angel. The lions never touched me.
scenes.image_prompt: Daniel standing calmly in the lion's den, a glowing angel beside him, lions sitting peacefully around him like gentle cats, warm golden light, joyful colorful storybook art

scenes.narration: The king pulled Daniel out — completely unharmed. Not a scratch. Not a mark.
scenes.image_prompt: Daniel being lifted out of the pit into the sunshine, the king embracing him with relief and joy, crowds cheering, bright cheerful colorful bible illustration

scenes.narration: You don't have to be the most powerful person in the room. You just have to know the One who is.
scenes.image_prompt: Daniel and the king standing together looking up at the sky, golden light shining down, peaceful lions visible in the den below, hopeful and joyful colorful storybook art
